title: 8-Bit Trial Chambers
description: 8-Bit Textures, Dithered Shadows, and 8-Bit Trial Chamber Sounds
body:
# 8-Bit Trial Chambers
Experience the Trial Chambers in full 8-bit glory just like a Classic Dungeon Crawler by downloading this Resource Pack! Try it both with and without Smooth Lighting!

This pack modifies shaders to increases contrast and saturation of all textures then restricts them to an 8-bit format. These shaders also create a dither effect as the light level decreases for an interesting 8-bit aesthetic! Plus, almost all sounds that could be emitted from playing through the Trial Chambers have been changed to a custom 8-bit one using the Famitracker Tool.

## Check it out in action here!
